description: Versatile men's adidas Pural sandals offer convenience and pleasure every day. WIth a covered toe there's more protection given to your forefoot, while the open sides and back keep your foot cool and ventilated, just like a regular floater. Upper Heavily meshed upper for enhanced breathable comfort with suede and leather panels for good shoe structure Velcro closures for forefoot and midfoot straps to offer a customised Fit Cushioned footbed for all-day massaged and cushioned comfort A cut out design on the sides for breathable comfort Midsole Rubber midsole that provides excellent cushioning and great traction Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced grip and traction adiPrene+ delivers supreme forefoot cushioning Heavy duty lugs which provide grip on any surface Sandal care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
